origin.note: Original plugin by dmedina. Genericized from a project-specific implementation.

customizations.summary: Genericized project references, added channel-first notifications
customizations.reason: Replace stock-manager-specific paths/commands with configurable placeholders. Add MCP reply tool as primary notification channel with curl fallback.

customizations.summary: Stripped stock-manager routes and app-specific categories (9-12)
customizations.reason: Route inventory and cross-page data coherence checks are stock-manager-specific. Replaced with dynamic route discovery and project-specific category placeholder.

customizations.summary: Parametrized server URLs, dev commands, and config paths
customizations.reason: Replace hardcoded localhost:3001/5173, pnpm commands, and tests/e2e paths with project config placeholders.

customizations.summary: Replaced commit script reference, parametrized lint/test commands
customizations.reason: Use plugin's own commit.sh instead of stock-manager's scripts/commit.sh. Replace pnpm lint/test with configurable commands.

customizations.summary: Removed hardcoded tests/e2e/ path, only cleans $TMPDIR
customizations.reason: tests/e2e/ is stock-manager-specific. Generic plugin should only clean temp directory patterns.

customizations.summary: Pre-approved commit script for autonomous loop execution
customizations.reason: Raw git add/commit triggers sandbox permission prompts that break /loop automation. Dedicated script can be pre-approved in settings.json.

customizations.summary: Standalone curl notifier, resolves credentials from forge-telegram's user-level env
customizations.reason: Reads ~/.claude/channels/telegram/.env (AUTHORIZED_CHAT_ID) as primary source, with plugin-root and project .env as legacy fallbacks. Replaces the old MCP-first dispatch now that forge-channels-telegram is gone.

customizations.summary: Genericized path scope, removed tests/e2e/** reference
customizations.reason: tests/e2e/ is stock-manager-specific. Plugin rule scopes to its own path; projects add their own e2e path rules.
